title: Ball from a Balloon
body: At a particular instant, a hot air balloon is $$100$$ $$m$$ in the air and descending at a constant speed of $$2.0$$ $$\frac{m}{s}$$. At this exact instant, a girl throws a ball horizontally, relative to herself, with an initial speed of $$20$$ $$\frac{m}{s}$$. Ignore air resistance.
lesson: 4. Motion in Two and Three Dimensions
